title: ZOCONE 12Pcs Silver Snowflake Napkin Rings and Reindeer Napkin Buckle for Christmas Table Decoration Metal Xmas Tissue Ring Xmas Napkins Rings for Christmas Dinner Party, Thanksgiving, Wedding

🎁 Usage scenarios: Napkin rings Christmas can enhance the decoration effect of the festival, mainly used to decorate the Christmas table, suitable for family gatherings or holiday parties, you can also use christmas napkins rings for Thanksgiving, New Year, theme parties
